title: The Secret of Madame Blanche
writer: Frances Goodrich, Albert Hackett, Martin Brown
actors: Irene Dunne, Lionel Atwill, Phillips Holmes
plot: Showgirl Sally meets young playboy Leonard St. John; they fall in love and are secretly married. When Leonard's father discovers this he sets out to break them apart, and following a bitter row, Leonard kills himself, leaving Sall...
